title: Comparison of single‑nucleus and single‑cell transcriptomes in hepatocellular carcinoma tissue.
author: Wen F Tang X Xu L Qu H
content: S-EPMC9494604 PMC9494604 Comparison of single‑nucleus and single‑cell transcriptomes in hepatocellular carcinoma tissue.
